title: lepisorus minor
intro: Lepisorus minor, also known as Chinese fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds that have been shown to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Lepisorus minor can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
